episodes.title: The Call
episodes.description: Former SAR coordinator Nora Vasquez gets a call about a missing hiker — the same ridge where she last worked.

episodes.title: Footprint
episodes.description: The missing man's trail leads to a camp that was abandoned days before he disappeared.

episodes.title: Local Knowledge
episodes.description: Nora's history in this valley makes her useful to the search — and uncomfortably close to the case.

episodes.title: The Ridge
episodes.description: A witness saw someone near the summit the night of the disappearance. No one lives up there.

episodes.title: Weather Window
episodes.description: A narrow search window before a storm closes the ridge for weeks drives desperate decisions.

episodes.title: Bone Room
episodes.description: A second discovery beneath the snow suggests this isn't the first time someone has disappeared here.

episodes.title: The Long Descent
episodes.description: Nora pieces together a picture of what the ridge has been used for — and by whom.

episodes.title: Resolution
episodes.description: The full story surfaces in the thaw — bittersweet and more complicated than anyone expected.

episodes.title: New Season
episodes.description: Nora is hired as a consultant for a cold case with connections to missing persons in three counties.

episodes.title: The Pattern
episodes.description: The geography of the missing cases describes a route — someone has been using the mountains systematically.

episodes.title: Old Maps
episodes.description: Survey maps from the 1940s show a different path through the high country — one that's never been closed.

episodes.title: The Witness Tree
episodes.description: A carved tree in the backcountry has been recording names and dates for decades.

episodes.title: Summit and Down
episodes.description: The route leads to a structure no one filed permits for — built into the mountain, not on it.

episodes.title: What the Mountain Keeps
episodes.description: Nora closes the case, but knows some parts of what she found will stay on the ridge.

extras.title: Filming at Altitude
extras.description: How the crew managed production in genuine wilderness conditions.

extras.title: The Real Search & Rescue
extras.description: Interviews with SAR volunteers who consulted on the series.
